name: SHORT EXPIRY - CLEARANCE: Reflex Kitten Treats - Meaty Sticks, gain Free Turkey (3 Sticks x 3g) 9g
shortDescription: Reflex Kitten Treats – Meaty Sticks with Turkey are? grain-free and made from delicious real meat. These high-protein, low-fat stick treats promote healthy chewing. Reward good behaviour with these fun and delicious treats made with the highest quality ingredients and bursting with flavour. Pack of 3 sticks.
description: Reflex Kitten Treats - Meaty Sticks with Turkey are? grain-free and made from delicious real meat. These high-protein, low-fat stick treats promote healthy chewing. Reward good behaviour with these fun and delicious treats made with the highest quality ingredients and bursting with flavour. Pack of 3 sticks. INGREDIENTS: Meat and animal derivatives (93%, 30% from turkey), minerals. NUTRIENT COMPONENTS Crude Protein (%) - 36 Oil Content (%) - 23 Crude Ash (%) - 8.5 Crude Fiber (%) - 1.5 Moisture Content (%) 27 Vitamin D - 500 IU Vitamin E - 5 mg Taurine - 1000 mg FEEDING RECOMMENDATIONS: Appropriate for kitten 4 months and older. Feed ? - 1 stick per day (depending on size and activity). Always adjust your kitten's diet accordingly. This product does not replace kitten's daily food requirement. Use within one day of opening.
